case_title: 1635 -10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. CINDY HUFF

docket_entries.description: AT THE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT CINDY HUFF, THE SMALL CLAIMS MOTION IS GRANTED AND THE MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT--UNLIMITED JURISDICTION AS ORDERED BY THE COURT. THE PLANTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APEARS. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
